one_line_thesis: AppLovin is a scaled performance-marketing platform with exceptional cash economics (82% Adjusted EBITDA margin in FY2025, 85% in Q1 2026).

deep_dive.executive_summary: AppLovin is a scaled performance-marketing platform with exceptional cash economics (82% Adjusted EBITDA margin in FY2025, 85% in Q1 2026). At $520.43 (NASDAQ, 2026-07-09), base expected annual return at today's price is 8.37% per year on filed FY2025 owner cash, well below our 15% bar. Competitive advantage (Munger moat) is stable: AXON-driven auction scale and advertiser ROI data create a reinforcing loop, though privacy regulation and platform policy changes remain structural risks. Asymmetric payoff (Pabrai dhando) is partial: net cash $2.5 billion and massive free cash flow limit funda...

decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: High-return compounder
applicability_tests: Owner earnings can be separated from stock compensation, working capital, and maintenance capital.
Incremental returns on retained capital are observable and durable.
The competitive advantage explains pricing, retention, share, or cost outcomes.
Terminal value is supported by a reinvestment runway rather than an unexplained multiple.
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: A complete security value is intentionally withheld while material components are unpriced. Attribution restarts after the first proof-complete baseline.

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

timeline.label: Q1 2026: revenue $1.84B (+59% YoY), $1.3B free cash flow; $1.0B share repurchases in quarter
FY2025: revenue $5.48B (+70%), Adjusted EBITDA $4.51B (82% margin), cash $2.49B
FY2024 inflection: net income $1.58B on $4.71B revenue; Advertising 68% of revenue at 91% segment EBITDA growth
Strategic review of Apps portfolio announced; focus shifts to AXON-powered Advertising platform
Return to profitability: FY2023 net income $357M after FY2022 net loss $193M
Wurl connected-TV platform integrated; expands beyond mobile gaming ad auctions
IPO on NASDAQ (ticker APP); dual-class structure with founder voting control
AXON AI advertising engine becomes core of AppDiscovery user-acquisition product
Adjust acquisition adds measurement and analytics platform (operated as separate data silo per 10-K footnote)
MAX in-app bidding monetization solution launched; real-time auction model for publisher inventory

industry.structure: Mobile and CTV performance advertising is concentrated among a handful of demand-side platforms (Google, Meta, AppLovin, Unity) competing for advertiser budgets via auction-based user acquisition and monetization tools.
industry.share_shift: AppLovin is gaining share in non-gaming performance marketing as AXON AI improves return on ad spend; legacy mobile gaming studios face consolidation while ad-tech platforms with superior targeting capture budgets.
industry.trend: Privacy rules (Apple IDFA, Google Privacy Sandbox) and AI-driven bidding are raising the bar for data scale and model quality; connected TV and retail media are the next growth arenas.

AppLovin Stock And 2 Fast Growing Insider Backed Tech Names    simplywall.st

risk_claims.claim: EPS (basic) growth moved from +91.5% to +110.0% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

*Primary risk: Privacy and platform-policy changes (Apple IDFA, Google Privacy Sandbox, app-store rules) degrade AXON targeting efficiency, compressing advertiser return on spend and auction volumes. Source: `AppLovin-Corporation-10K-FY24_As-Filed.pdf` Item 1A (risk factors on IDFA and platform dependence).

*Lens failure mode (operating): If Adjusted EBITDA margin falls below 75% while revenue growth drops under 20%, the software-platform narrative fails and the name re-rates as a cyclical ad vendor. Monitor quarterly in `Financial-Update-Q1-2026.pdf` margin charts.
